chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.D-2104 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has raised an objection regarding the maintainability of this petition, asserting that it falls outside of the jurisdiction of this Court. After such objection, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition with permission to file the same before the Court, having jurisdiction. In view of above, the instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition before the Court, having jurisdiction. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
